data.body: B5 checklist add (per epic follow-up): when cutting plan-review over to the workflow path, confirm whether the worm-folly-barge stale-attestation stopgap in CLAUDE.md is still needed; if the workflow path's attestation isn't whole-HEAD-bound (or boil-golem-veto/ADR 0002 fixed it), REMOVE that stopgap guidance from CLAUDE.md as part of this story.
